jsonSchema.title: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS collector configuration.

update_every.title: Update every
update_every.description: Data collection interval, measured in seconds.

autodetection_retry.title: Detection retry
autodetection_retry.description: Recheck interval in seconds. Zero means no recheck will be scheduled.

url.title: URL
url.description: The base URL of the PAN-OS firewall management interface.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: PAN-OS XML API request timeout, measured in seconds.

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: PAN-OS XML API key. Takes priority over username/password key generation.

username.title: Username
username.description: PAN-OS administrator username used to generate an API key.

password.title: Password
password.description: PAN-OS administrator password used to generate an API key.

vsys.title: VSYS
vsys.description: Optional PAN-OS virtual system scope for operational commands.

collect_licenses.title: Collect licenses
collect_licenses.description: Collect license status and expiration metrics.

max_bgp_peers.title: Max BGP peers
max_bgp_peers.description: Maximum number of BGP peers monitored with per-peer charts.

max_bgp_prefix_families_per_peer.title: Max BGP prefix families per peer
max_bgp_prefix_families_per_peer.description: Maximum number of BGP prefix-counter address families monitored per BGP peer.

max_bgp_virtual_routers.title: Max BGP virtual routers
max_bgp_virtual_routers.description: Maximum number of BGP virtual routers or logical routers monitored with per-VR charts.

max_environment_sensors.title: Max environment sensors
max_environment_sensors.description: Maximum number of environment sensors monitored with per-sensor charts.

max_licenses.title: Max licenses
max_licenses.description: Maximum number of licenses monitored with per-license charts.

max_ipsec_tunnels.title: Max IPsec tunnels
max_ipsec_tunnels.description: Maximum number of IPsec tunnels monitored with per-tunnel charts.

bgp_peers.title: BGP peer selector
bgp_peers.description: Include or exclude BGP peers. Matching is performed against `vr/peer_address`, for example `default/192.0.2.1`.

includes.title: Include
includes.description: Include BGP peers that match any of the specified include patterns.

excludes.title: Exclude
excludes.description: Exclude BGP peers that match any of the specified exclude patterns.

bgp_prefix_families.title: BGP prefix family selector
bgp_prefix_families.description: Include or exclude BGP peer prefix-counter families. Matching is performed against `vr/peer_address/afi/safi`, for example `default/192.0.2.1/ipv4/unicast`.

includes.title: Include
includes.description: Include BGP prefix families that match any of the specified include patterns.

excludes.title: Exclude
excludes.description: Exclude BGP prefix families that match any of the specified exclude patterns.

bgp_virtual_routers.title: BGP virtual router selector
bgp_virtual_routers.description: Include or exclude BGP virtual routers or logical routers. Matching is performed against the PAN-OS virtual router/logical router name.

includes.title: Include
includes.description: Include BGP virtual routers that match any of the specified include patterns.

excludes.title: Exclude
excludes.description: Exclude BGP virtual routers that match any of the specified exclude patterns.

environment_sensors.title: Environment sensor selector
environment_sensors.description: Include or exclude environment sensors. Matching is performed against `sensor_type/slot/sensor`, for example `temperature/1/Temperature Inlet`.

includes.title: Include
includes.description: Include environment sensors that match any of the specified include patterns.

excludes.title: Exclude
excludes.description: Exclude environment sensors that match any of the specified exclude patterns.

licenses.title: License selector
licenses.description: Include or exclude licenses. Matching is performed against the PAN-OS license feature name.

includes.title: Include
includes.description: Include licenses that match any of the specified include patterns.

excludes.title: Exclude
excludes.description: Exclude licenses that match any of the specified exclude patterns.

ipsec_tunnels.title: IPsec tunnel selector
ipsec_tunnels.description: Include or exclude IPsec tunnels. Matching is performed against `name/gateway/remote/tunnel_id`.

includes.title: Include
includes.description: Include IPsec tunnels that match any of the specified include patterns.

excludes.title: Exclude
excludes.description: Exclude IPsec tunnels that match any of the specified exclude patterns.

vnode.title: Vnode
vnode.description: Associates this data collection job with a Virtual Node.

tls_skip_verify.title: Skip TLS verification
tls_skip_verify.description: If set, TLS certificate verification will be skipped.

tls_ca.title: TLS CA
tls_ca.description: The path to the CA certificate file for TLS verification.

tls_cert.title: TLS certificate
tls_cert.description: The path to the client certificate file for TLS authentication.

tls_key.title: TLS key
tls_key.description: The path to the client key file for TLS authentication.

proxy_url.title: Proxy URL
proxy_url.description: The URL of the proxy server.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include in PAN-OS XML API requests.

vnode.ui:placeholder: To use this option, first create a Virtual Node and then reference its name here.

bgp_peers.ui:help: The logic for inclusion and exclusion is `(include1 OR include2) AND !(exclude1 OR exclude2)`. Pattern examples: `* default/*`, `= default/192.0.2.1`, `~ ^default/192\.0\.2\.`.

bgp_prefix_families.ui:help: The logic for inclusion and exclusion is `(include1 OR include2) AND !(exclude1 OR exclude2)`. Match value format: `vr/peer_address/afi/safi`.

bgp_virtual_routers.ui:help: The logic for inclusion and exclusion is `(include1 OR include2) AND !(exclude1 OR exclude2)`.

environment_sensors.ui:help: The logic for inclusion and exclusion is `(include1 OR include2) AND !(exclude1 OR exclude2)`. Match value format: `sensor_type/slot/sensor`.

licenses.ui:help: The logic for inclusion and exclusion is `(include1 OR include2) AND !(exclude1 OR exclude2)`.

ipsec_tunnels.ui:help: The logic for inclusion and exclusion is `(include1 OR include2) AND !(exclude1 OR exclude2)`. Match value format: `name/gateway/remote/tunnel_id`.
